name: Loft18 Broussard
about: Loft18 is an interactive sports bar and grill designed for year-round, all-weather golf and multi-sport action. The venue features custom-built Full Swing Golf simulation bays that deliver precision play for golfers of all experience levels. It operates as a full-service restaurant, bar, and lounge offering gastro-pub fare, craft beer, and cocktails in a casual, easy-going atmosphere with a strong emphasis on hospitality and socializing. The concept combines indoor golfing with a dining experience tailored for both sport enthusiasts and those seeking a relaxed social environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Custom-built Full Swing Golf simulation bays for precision play
Full-service restaurant and bar allowing for a complete social and dining experience
Award-winning multi-sport simulators suitable for all skill levels
Kicked-back atmosphere focused on relaxed socializing and networking

food_and_drink.notes: Gastro-pub fare from a full-service kitchen, featuring locally sourced ingredients and an ever-changing menu. Reserve a table to dine in.
Full bar service available on-site with craft beer and cocktails.

simulator_hardware.notes: Custom-built Full Swing Golf simulation bays.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is not explicitly stated whether rental clubs are available, but the facility is designed for golfers of all levels, suggesting some form of club provision is likely available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, Loft18 is a full-service restaurant and bar, so external food and drinks are not permitted. You can dine and order drinks directly from their menu and bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes is not specified, but typical simulator bays allow for rounds to be completed in 2-3 hours depending on the game format and number of players.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Loft18 is described as a welcoming sports bar and grill, and the website features food and social images, suggesting a family-friendly environment where children are welcome.
